english translation text:
1) Stay away from food and water until late afternoon. (This is not a fast and thus should not be kept with the intention of fasting)
2) Focus on the great tragedy that took place on this day and avoid laughing and unnecessary chitchat.
3) Recite Salawat as many times possible.
On the day of Ashura

arabic text: اَعْظَمَ ٱللَّهُ اُجُوْرَنَا بِمُصَابِنَا بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
english translation text:
May Allah make our reward and Your reward great, for our grief for Hussain, peace be on Him.
4) Console each other by saying the following
May He place us and You from those who help his cause…

arabic text: مَعَ وَلِيِّهِ ٱلِإِمَامِ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّ مِنَآَلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
english translation text: …with His representative, the guided Imam from the family of Muhammad, peace be on them."
